feature: production-grade lifecycle safety for SDKConnect (strict transitions, serialized operations, reconnect/token race guards, internal app lifecycle handling, interruption recovery, audio route events)
constraints_preserved: JWT expiry enforced before media connect
Invalid signals emit error events (no silent drops)
Facade split preserves a single CallEngine authority
Accept flows fail fast on callType mismatches
Media-event mutations serialized through CallEngine queue
Signal replay cache is bounded and cleared on idle
verified_facts: All CallEngine state-mutating operations serialized through _operationQueue chain
Media event handlers route through queue via _runSerialized
VoiceCallSdk registers as WidgetsBindingObserver with try/catch guard
CallEngine tracks _isInterrupted flag; paused/inactive/hidden emits interruptionStarted
setSpeakerOn emits audioRouteChanged from CallEngine; LiveKitMediaEngine emits MediaEngineEvent
Token refresh deduplication via _tokenRefreshInFlight shared future
_isTransitionAllowed matrix enforces valid FSM edges at every _transition call
Replay dedup set bounded to 512 entries with LRU eviction; cleared on idle
_isActionDebounced with per-action key and 350ms default prevents burst duplicates
